Choose trust and excellence. Choose safety and cost effectiveness. Safety Safety is the highest priority in Orchid. Our employees are highly valued and we have a high retention rate. We aim for yearly 0 accidents. Trained for excellence Our technicians are the company’s strong arm. Orchid has a team of motivated, quality–focused, highly trained certified technicians, fully equipped with high-end technology, ready to accomplish any task. Attractive employer Orchid is an attractive employer offering unique possibilities for working in the wind industry. A bulk of our highly skilled technicians are engineers. Career development is based upon site performance, safety record and customer satisfaction. Availability Our full range of services are available regardless the location of your project. In order to deliver the high level of quality services to our international customers, we rely on instant response to the constantly changing wind industry. Working with Orchid Orchid is the most cost-effective choice for any company that wishes to invest in green energy produced by wind turbines. Following an elaborate strategy, developed specifically for each project, our top technicians have become masters at optimizing and maximizing wind turbine production at a lower cost per kWh. We truly believe that a strong partnership requires a flawless communication. Project owners have full acces to maintenance records, productivity/efficiency logs, real-time progress reports, control over spare parts and defects. read more Turnover for 2025 21 MEUR Employees over 310 Projects over 250 Installed & serviced GW over 3 News Orchid at KEY – The Energy Transition Expo 2026 Read More » 04/03/2026 Looking Ahead: WindEurope 2026 Read More » 27/01/2026 What’s Next? WindEnergy 2026 Read More » 31/07/2025 Load More Orchid at KEY – The Energy Transition Expo 2026 March 4, 2026 Orchid participated in KEY – The Energy Transition Expo in Rimini, Italy, one of Europe’s leading events dedicated to renewable energy. This presence reflects Orchid’s read more Looking Ahead: WindEurope 2026 January 27, 2026 Orchid will attend WindEurope 2026 in Madrid, a key event bringing together leading players from across the wind energy sector. This participation reflects Orchid’s ongoing read more What’s Next? WindEnergy 2026 July 31, 2025 It’s official: Orchid is returning to WindEnergy in Hamburg for 2026! With our stand secured and the team ready to shine, we’re set to showcase how our company’s development. read more Cudalbi Milestone: Mechanical Installation Complete July 15, 2025 Orchid has successfully completed the mechanical installation phase at Cudalbi Wind Farm. Working on of the most complex turbines in the sector, our team successfully delivered this key stage even in record time and quality, therefore we are very proud of our colleagues and their performance! read more Reaching New Milestones: over 3 GW Installed July 7, 2025 Orchid has reached a new milestone: over 3 GW of wind energy installed or serviced worldwide. This achievement reflects our quality in performance, dedication and the hard worked build trust of our major OEM partners, who share our vision. read more Proud Members of RWEA June 25, 2025 Orchid is proud to be a member of the Romanian Wind Energy Association (RWEA). This step reflects our commitment to renewable energy and our ambition to contribute to shaping the future of wind power in Romania and beyond. read more Wind Open Day 2025 June 15, 2025 We joined Wind Open Day 2025 at Vifor – a celebration of wind energy, innovation, and sustainable futures. sources.text: Muehlhan - Landing page | Muehlhan Wind Services Muehlhan Wind Service delivers full-scope wind turbine services across onshore and offshore projects. Muehlhan Wind Service delivers full-scope wind turbine services across onshore and offshore projects. Operating globally, we support asset owners and OEMs in delivering reliable performance across the turbine lifecycle. Industrial Services Within Industrial Services we provide services within the areas of surface treatment. Within Industrial Services we provide services within the areas of surface treatment, welding & mechanical insulation, inspection, access & scaffolding, and passive fire protection, maintenance and repair work.
